intro: Unlock more classes, recruit more allies, and build your survivor legion!
description:
• Multi-Character Team Battles
 Each character has unique skills and attributes, allowing flexible combinations based on combat needs. Whether you prefer powerful melee warriors or spell-casting mages, you’ll always find a role that suits your playstyle.

• Flexible Formation Switching
 Choose to gather your team into a circular formation to boost attack power, or spread them out in a line to increase speed. With simple switching controls, you can react quickly to the ever-changing battlefield and unleash your team’s full potential.

• Diverse Build Paths
 Different playstyles complement each other, enabling a wide variety of combat strategies. Explore countless possibilities, discover hidden combos and optimal builds, and let your heroes unleash their unique power and style in battle.

• Fast-Paced Combat
 A quick and rhythmic combat system makes every strike feel impactful. Combined with smooth animations and dazzling skill effects, it delivers an addictive fast-paced fighting experience.
